column1: # F5 GOTO — prompts on line 3 for an address, then moves the pointer.
# SPEC §6 tutorial: "F5 goes to a cell; pointer moves, highlight follows."
# F5 opens the GOTO prompt on line 3.
ASSERT_PANEL_L3   Enter address to go to
# Type a short address and Enter — pointer jumps to it, mode back to READY.
# A second jump from a non-origin cell.
# Esc cancels the prompt — pointer unchanged.
# Garbage input (row 0 is invalid in 1-2-3) commits as a no-op:
# pointer stays put, mode returns to READY.
# Lowercase letters are accepted (Address::parse uppercases internally).
